steps.title: Solid and Sound
steps.text: The Caro-Kann (1.e4 c6) prepares ...d5 with support from the c-pawn. Unlike the French, the light-squared bishop develops freely. It's quiet, strategic, and famously difficult to break down.

steps.prompt: White's main reply: strengthen the center.

steps.title: The Break
steps.text: Black now plays 2...d5, challenging White's center directly. White can advance (e5), exchange (exd5), or push into the Advance Variation. Each leads to a different type of game.
